goal: Expose state graph memory lifecycle candidate, status, source, evidence, and relation metadata as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human memory report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Graph memory reports include memory candidates, lifecycle statuses, proposal lineage, evidence links, and relation provenance, but CI and release scripts must parse human text to assert state-backed memory lineage.
